title: Display text in dashboards widgets
excerpt: We would like to report on survey results and display comments. While the charts support the results fairly well I am really struggling to find a way to display comments. You can use a table widget but the limitation in …

posts.author: gscherf (Greg Scherf)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like to report on survey results and display comments. While the charts support the results fairly well I am really struggling to find a way to display comments. You can use a table widget but the limitation in displaying column width prevents you expanding the column to a reasonable length.

Any ideas?

posts.author: Angie81171 (Angie Louth)
posts.cookedHtml:
@gscherf Did you ever find a good way to display comments from a survey? We have a similar situation.
Thanks!!
Angie

posts.author: iankerry (Ian Kerry)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes me too! One one survey field we ask for other ideas, and i would like a list of all those items. Anyone know how? thanks
